title: Instrument-Assisted Soft Tissue Mobilization
description: A two-day practical course in IASTM, which means treating tight and painful soft tissue with hand-held tools. It covered when the tools help, when they should not be used, and how to combine them with manual therapy.
detail: Neuro Projekt · 20 teaching hours (15.5 clock hours) · 17–18.02.2024
